notes:
For basic printing functionality use the Postscript PPD. For advanced functionality such as printer status and maintenance features, use the HPLIP driver (which includes HPIJS).

Fast CMYK 4-ink printer.

PostScript/PCL6 printer based on the Color LaserJet 4600.

Consumables/Refills: 4 separate ink cartridges and 4 separate printheads, one for each color (CMYK)
